# Mason J. Bennett — masonjbennett.com

Personal site of Mason J. Bennett: M.S. Finance graduate (May 2026, 4.0 GPA),
Sam M. Walton College of Business, University of Arkansas. Based in
Dallas–Fort Worth, TX. Seeking analyst roles in investment banking, private
equity, wealth management, and corporate finance.

IMPORTANT FRAMING: The LBO deal work on this site consists of GRADUATE
COURSEWORK RECONSTRUCTIONS of real transactions, rebuilt as hypothetical
acquisitions from publicly available filings. Mason led student deal teams;
he was NOT part of the actual transactions.

## Credentials
- M.S. Finance, 4.0/4.0 GPA, Walton College of Business (May 2026)
- B.S. Business Administration (Business Economics), 3.62 GPA, Dean's List x5 (May 2024)
- Analyst, Information Technology Sector — Shollmier Investment Fund, a $700K+
  student-managed portfolio at the Garrison Financial Institute (Spring 2026)
- Bloomberg Market Concepts (BMC), certified April 2026 (certificate: /bmc-certificate.pdf)
- FINRA SIE in progress; CFA Level I planned
- Funded 100% of undergraduate education through service-industry work

## Work samples
- EA $55B take-private LBO — student reconstruction: 38-page memo, 24-slide IC
  deck, 12-tab Excel LBO model (downloads: /deals/ea-lbo-model.xlsx, /deals/ea-memo.pdf)
- Jagex £900M sponsor-to-sponsor LBO — student reconstruction: 10-tab model,
  QoE bridge, PE fund waterfall (downloads: /deals/jagex-lbo-model.xlsx, /deals/jagex-memo.pdf)
- HCA Healthcare stock pitch — Garrison Financial Institute competition,
  1 of 4 graduate teams (Oct 2025)
- Interactive mini-LBO model, merger math (accretion/dilution) sandbox, and a
  paper-LBO drill generator, all built in React (/projects)
- ML credit-default classifier: 0.9931 ROC-AUC on 70,000 loans
- Live apps: budgeting app (masonbennett-budget.streamlit.app) and portfolio
  analytics app (Streamlit)
